title: Home Based Parenting Education * Ex-Offenders - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Home Based Parenting Education * Ex-Offenders 1 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Children and Youth With Disabilities/Health Conditions Ex-Offenders Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF PATHFINDER NETWORK PATHFINDER NETWORK CENTER FOR FAMILY SUCCESS HOME VISITING PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides parenting support to families who are involved in the criminal justice system through weekly home visits which include helping parents with child-centered play, learning about childhood development, developmental screening, and information and referral to other social and health services 7305 NE Glisan Street Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: Families who are involved in the criminal justice system who have children ages 0-6 regardless of current custodial status Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 892-5396 1003 Get Directions Visit Website More Details PATHFINDER NETWORK HOME VISITING PROGRAM
